cited_facts.why_it_matters: Explicitly states the amendment status is 'obsolete/removed: OBSOLETE', which triggers the REJECT rule for retired/obsolete proposals.
Confirms the amendment was disabled due to a bug and will be replaced by a future release (BatchV1_1), reinforcing its obsolete status.

output_json.decision_summary: The packet explicitly identifies the amendment 'fixBatchInnerSigs' as obsolete/removed (F5) and notes it was disabled due to a bug and replaced by a future version (F1). According to the task rules, REJECT must be used for retired/obsolete proposals. Therefore, the route is REJECT.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: The amendment is active and requires a vote.

validator_work_item.recommended_validator_action: Reject the amendment as it is obsolete and has been replaced.
validator_work_item.title: Reject Obsolete Amendment fixBatchInnerSigs
